stemHtml: Consider a multi-engine aeroplane. In order to achieve the best possible climb performance, which of the following methods is used to maintain control after an engine failure?

options.a: Rudder to stop yaw, aileron to maintain wings level.
options.b: Rudder to stop yaw, aileron to bank towards the live engine.
options.c: Rudder to stop yaw, aileron to bank towards the failed engine.
options.d: Aileron to stop yaw, rudder to keep the slip indicator centred.
